# BLVSTACK

> AI systems studio. Custom AI agents, automation systems, and websites for businesses ready to scale without hiring.

## Who We Are

BLVSTACK is a founder-led AI systems studio founded by **Blue Bolton**. We design and build production-grade AI infrastructure for founders, operators, and growing businesses who need systems that work — not tools to manage.

Every engagement is run directly by Blue Bolton. No account managers, no offshore teams, no handoffs. The person who scopes your project is the person who ships it.

- **Founded:** 2024
- **Founder:** Blue Bolton
- **Location:** United States (remote-first, serves clients nationally)
- **Website:** https://blvstack.com
- **Contact:** hello@blvstack.com
- **Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/blvstack/

## What We Build

### L1 · AI Agents ($5,000–$15,000)
Single-purpose conversational AI systems that handle real operational work:
- Lead qualification and routing agents
- Appointment booking and scheduling agents
- Customer support triage agents
- Follow-up and nurture sequence agents
- Voice agents for inbound calls
- Built on Anthropic Claude and OpenAI GPT-4
- Typical build: 2–4 weeks

### L2 · Automation Systems ($15,000–$35,000)
Multi-step workflow automation connecting tools, data sources, and business logic:
- CRM-driven pipeline automations
- Intake-to-fulfillment pipelines
- Document generation and processing
- Scheduled jobs and status orchestration
- Multi-agent orchestration systems
- Typical build: 2–4 weeks

### L3 · AI-Native Interfaces ($25,000–$50,000+)
Custom websites, internal tools, dashboards, and client portals built AI-native:
- Custom marketing websites with embedded AI agents
- Internal admin systems and operations dashboards
- Client-facing portals with automation built in
- AI-powered intake and onboarding flows
- Typical build: 2–6 weeks

## Technology Stack

- **AI/LLM:** Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT-4, custom RAG pipelines
- **Frontend:** Astro, Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- **Backend:** Node.js, Supabase (PostgreSQL), Vercel Edge Functions
- **Automation:** Custom-built pipelines, Resend (email), Stripe (payments)
- **Infrastructure:** Vercel, Cloudflare, Supabase, GitHub
- **Client owns all code, codebase, and infrastructure — no platform lock-in**

## Who We Work With

BLVSTACK works with:
- Early-stage and growth-stage founders
- Operators running service businesses that rely on manual processes
- Companies spending significant time on repetitive operational tasks
- Businesses that have outgrown no-code tools and need real infrastructure
- Leadership teams that treat software as a competitive advantage

We do NOT work with:
- Businesses looking for templated WordPress or Shopify sites
- No-code-only builds without owned code
- Hourly retainers without scoped deliverables
- Generic chatbot widget installs

## Featured Work

### Precise Aesthetics
Launch site for The Precise System™ — a clinical pico laser platform for aesthetic medicine. Built in 4 weeks for a high-stakes product launch. Included AI-powered practitioner qualification flow and clinical content system.
- URL: https://blvstack.com/work/precise-aesthetics

## How It Works

1. **Start a Project** — seven-step intake at https://blvstack.com/start
2. **Discovery call** — Blue reviews every submission personally, responds within 24 hours
3. **Audit** — we map your current stack and identify the highest-leverage build
4. **Design + Build** — scoped engagement, production-grade delivery
5. **Deploy** — you own everything; we support the handoff

Typical engagement length: 2–6 weeks depending on scope.
Limited client slots per quarter to maintain quality.

## Principles

- Systems beat features
- The client owns the code
- Less surface, more depth
- Production-grade by default
- Speed is a quality
